{{CargoRelic
|name=Engine 86
|class_id=20317
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=This is the engine installed in the fifth-generation Toyato Corolla. It features turbocharging technology with 200-horsepower output. Complemented by rear-wheel drive and excellent gas mileage, this car is very suitable for long-distance rally racing.
|fame=14
|art=16
|fth=16
|civ=13
|tech=31
|ss1=Per 5 Mecha Gene LVLs, Snail RUSH +1<br>Mecha Gene LVLs Researched: 150/150
|ss2=Per 5 Mecha Gene LVLs, Snail RUSH +2<br>Mecha Gene LVLs Researched: 150/150
|ss3=Per 5 Mecha Gene LVLs, Snail RUSH +3<br>Mecha Gene LVLs Researched: 150/150
|ss4=Per 5 Mecha Gene LVLs, Snail RUSH +3<br>Mecha Gene LVLs Researched: 150/150
|ss7=Per 5 Mecha Gene LVLs, Snail RUSH +3<br>Mecha Gene LVLs Researched: 150/150<br> (Awakened)
}}
